languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

languages.text: "Мудрейший, я не ослышалась, вы назвали меня чудом? Служитель Омниссии, желающий обменяться со мной знаниями — не меньшая редкость, чем золотая песчинка, затерявшаяся в барханах Ифрита! Что же, я приветствую любую возможность обогащения. Знаниями — в том числе".

"O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

"O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

languages.text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, ¿me engañan mis oídos o acaba de considerarme un milagro? ¡Un sirviente del Omnissiah dispuesto a intercambiar conocimiento conmigo es tan raro como encontrar una pepita de oro en las dunas de Efreet! En cuanto al enriquecimiento, siempre estoy abierta a todas las oportunidades. Conocimiento incluido».
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

En cuanto al enriquecimiento, siempre estoy abierta a todas las oportunidades. Conocimiento incluido».

languages.text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、アタシの耳がどうかしたのかしら、それとも今、アタシを奇跡とお呼びになりまして？ アタシと知識を交換してくださるオムニッシアの僕など、エフリートの砂丘で一粒の金を見つけるのに劣らぬ珍しい掘り出し物ですわ！ それに充実とくれば、アタシはあらゆる機会に前向きですの。知識も含めてね」
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

traits.locale_text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、アタシの耳がどうかしたのかしら、それとも今、アタシを奇跡とお呼びになりまして？ アタシと知識を交換してくださるオムニッシアの僕など、エフリートの砂丘で一粒の金を見つけるのに劣らぬ珍しい掘り出し物ですわ！ それに充実とくれば、アタシはあらゆる機会に前向きですの。知識も含めてね」

languages.text: “世间最睿智之人啊，是我的耳朵出了毛病，还是你刚才确实称我为奇迹？愿意与我交换知识的欧姆尼赛亚仆从，简直比艾弗里特沙丘里的金沙还稀罕！至于共同进步，我对一切机会都持开放态度——知识方面也不例外。”
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

traits.locale_text: “世间最睿智之人啊，是我的耳朵出了毛病，还是你刚才确实称我为奇迹？愿意与我交换知识的欧姆尼赛亚仆从，简直比艾弗里特沙丘里的金沙还稀罕！至于共同进步，我对一切机会都持开放态度——知识方面也不例外。”

languages.text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, irre ich mich oder habt Ihr mich gerade als Wunder bezeichnet? Ein Diener des Omnissiah, der bereit ist, sich mit mir auszutauschen, ist ein ebenso seltener Fund als ein Klumpen Gold in den Dünen von Efreet! Und wenn es um Bereicherung geht, bin ich für alles offen. Wissen eingeschlossen."
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, irre ich mich oder habt Ihr mich gerade als Wunder bezeichnet? Und wenn es um Bereicherung geht, bin ich für alles offen. Wissen eingeschlossen."

languages.text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, est-ce que mes sens me trompent, ou venez-vous de me qualifier de miracle ? Un serviteur de l'Omnimessie prêt à partager ses connaissances avec moi ? C'est aussi rare qu'une pépite d'or dans les dunes d'Éfrit ! Toutes les richesses m'intéressent. Même les connaissances. »
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."

traits.locale_text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, est-ce que mes sens me trompent, ou venez-vous de me qualifier de miracle ? Un serviteur de l'Omnimessie prêt à partager ses connaissances avec moi ? C'est aussi rare qu'une pépite d'or dans les dunes d'Éfrit ! Toutes les richesses m'intéressent. Même les connaissances. »

languages.text: "Ey bilgelerin bilgesi, kulaklarım beni yanıltıyor mu yoksa bana az önce mucize mi dedin? Benimle bilgi alışverişinde bulunmaya istekli bir Hermesih hizmetkârı, İfrit kumullarında bulunan bir altın zerresi kadar nadirdir! Zenginleşme söz konusu olduğunda tüm fırsatlara açığım. İrfan da dâhil."
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."
